rationale.R1.5: The revision reorders the paragraphs to improve flow and connect the method to prior work on spectral bias. However, it doesn't provide a detailed rationale for each section.
rationale.RX.1: While the revision acknowledges some limitations of PINNs, it doesn't explicitly flag uncertainty about specific claims or recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The revised section covers exactly the requested active set of dimensions (J*(d)).
rationale.RX.4: The revision does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revision doesn't provide detailed provenance and traceability for each change made.
